description_long: This is a single gray slip-on house slipper with a low, open back and a closed, rounded toe. The upper material appears to be a soft, felt-like fabric, providing comfort and warmth. A small red and white cross emblem is stitched on the outer side, adding a subtle decorative detail. The sole is thin and flat, likely made of a flexible rubber or synthetic material, with a slightly textured appearance for grip. The interior is lined with the same soft material as the exterior, ensuring a cozy fit. The slipper is designed for indoor use, prioritizing comfort and ease of slipping on and off.
description: A gray felt slip-on house slipper with a red and white cross emblem and a thin, flat sole. It is soft, comfortable, and easy to wear indoors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slipper's low back, rounded toe, and the subtle red and white cross emblem on the upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open back and the interior lining, with the toe area and part of the sole visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the emblem more clearly and the overall slim profile of the slipper.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the closed toe and the smooth, uninterrupted upper surface.
attribute_logo: red and white cross emblem on the outer side of the slipper
